name: Honey Barbequed Salmon with Mache
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup finely chopped fresh jalapeño chili
3 tablespoons firmly packed light brown sugar
2 tablespoons finely chopped fresh coriander sprigs
recipeInstructions:
Make sauce:
In a heavy saucepan, stir together the sauce ingredients and simmer, stirring occasionally, for 15 minutes. Sauce keeps, covered and chilled, 1 week.
Make dressing:
In a small bowl, whisk together the dressing ingredients with salt and pepper to taste until combined well. Chill dressing for 15 minutes.
Brush both sides of each salmon fillet with about 1/3 cup sauce and grill on a well-oiled rack set about 4 to 5 inches over glowing coals for 3 minutes on each side, or until the salmon just flakes. Divide mâche among 6 plates and top with salmon. Spoon dressing over salmon.
